optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】伊曼努尔·康德.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】约翰·斯图尔特·密尔.

explanation.basis: 这道题考察的是道德行为（Ethical Behavior）。
explanation.correctReason: 判断时抓住：七大原则:诚信、客观、胜任、公平、保密、专业、勤勉；客观的两大障碍=认知偏差(确认偏差)与利益冲突；公平三概念=平等、黄金法则、各得其所。题干问正确或最符合规则的选项，亚里士多德符合该考点要求。所以正确答案是 B。

optionAnalysis.A: A 不选：苏格拉底不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.B: B 正确：亚里士多德。题干问正确或最符合规则的选项，亚里士多德符合该考点要求。
optionAnalysis.C: C 不选：伊曼努尔·康德不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.D: D 不选：约翰·斯图尔特·密尔不符合题干要求。

explanation.basis: 这道题考察的是专业伦理的重要性（Professional Ethics）。
explanation.correctReason: 判断时抓住：三种动机:自利、情感、道德;对客户的关怀义务须先于自利；信任方程式：可信度、可靠性和亲密度越高，自利程度越低，信任越高。题干问“不是/错误/例外”的选项，马基雅维利主义不属于该规则或不符合题干要求。所以正确答案是 D。

optionAnalysis.A: A 不选：道德动机不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.B: B 不选：情感/偏爱不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.C: C 不选：自利动机不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.D: D 正确：马基雅维利主义。题干问“不是/错误/例外”的选项，马基雅维利主义不属于该规则或不符合题干要求。

explanation.basis: 这道题考察的是专业伦理的重要性（Professional Ethics）。
explanation.correctReason: 判断时抓住：道德高于合规:合规=法律字面/最低线,道德=法律精神。题干问“不是/错误/例外”的选项，做正确的事不属于该规则或不符合题干要求。所以正确答案是 B。

optionAnalysis.A: A 不选：避免制裁不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.B: B 正确：做正确的事。题干问“不是/错误/例外”的选项，做正确的事不属于该规则或不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.C: C 不选：寻求晋升不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.D: D 不选：继续从事该业务不符合题干要求。

However, she has not sought permission from the insurance company she represents. 以下哪项陈述 about Emma’s action 是真实/正确的?

optionsEn.C: Emma is unethical and not compliant.

optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Emma is ethical and compliant.

stemEn:
Roger is a licensed financial adviser representative. His clients, Andy and Emma (husband and wife) have recently filed for divorce. Roger advises Andy to buy a large insurance policy for his elderly parents and park the policy under a living trust so that he can pay a lower divorce settlement to his ex-wife.

Which of the following statements correctly describes Roger’s ethical behaviour?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger is a 持牌财务顾问 代表. His clients, Andy and Emma (husband and wife) have recently filed for divorce. Roger advises Andy to buy a large insurance policy for his elderly parents and park the policy under a living trust so that he can pay a lower divorce settlement to his ex-wife. 以下哪项陈述 correctly describes Roger’s ethical behaviour?

optionsEn.A: Roger creates a conflict-of-interest situation by putting Emma in a worse-off situation.
optionsEn.B: Roger finds himself in a “built-in” unethical situation.
optionsEn.C: Roger’s behaviour is ethical if he has declared the facts clearly to Roger’s parents.
optionsEn.D: Roger’s commission will be clawed back as such sales are considered unethical and not in the best interest for clients.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger creates a conflict-of-interest situation by putting Emma in a worse-off situation.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger finds himself in a “built-in” unethical situation.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger’s behaviour is ethical if he has declared the facts clearly to Roger’s parents.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger’s commission will be clawed back as such sales are considered unethical and not in the best interest for clients.

stemEn: Jack Bean is the sole proprietor of an export-import business in textiles. optionsEn.D: Active listening is the process of assuming the client’s moral motivation behind his words.

optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Active listening is the process of assuming the client’s 道德动机 motivation behind his words.

optionAnalysis.C: C 不选：该选项不符合题干要求。

stemEn:
Joe lost a lawsuit and is liable to pay $2m to the claimant. He does not have enough bankable assets to pay for the damage. However, he and his wife, Mary, have a fully paid private property. Joe is thinking of taking up home equity loans to pay his legal damages.
Which of the following statements correctly spells out the risk of this strategy?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Joe lost a lawsuit and is liable to pay $2m to the claimant. He does not have enough bankable assets to pay for the damage. However, he and his wife, Mary, have a fully paid private property. Joe is thinking of taking up home equity loans to pay his legal damages. 以下哪项陈述 correctly spells out the risk of this strategy?

optionsEn.A: Joe and Mary should consider speaking with the financial institutions to understand the risk as they may lose the property if they are unable to pay back the loan.
optionsEn.B: Home equity loan is not allowed on private property owned by an individual who is currently undergoing a lawsuit and is subject to paying damages.
optionsEn.C: There is a 30% stamp duty on the property value to be imposed on the home equity loan as it is considered an ownership of a second property.

stemEn:

OA = Ordinary Account
SA = Special Account
RA = Retirement Account
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Besides retirement, CPF can be used for other objectives such as property purchases. 以下哪项陈述 correctly describes the funding mechanism of CPF for its members in their purchases of properties? OA = Ordinary Account SA = Special Account RA = Retirement Account

optionsEn.A: CPF members can use their CPF- OA, SA & RA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.B: CPF members can only use their CPFOA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.C: CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of the Basic Retirement Sum (BRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.D: CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of Full Retirement Sum (FRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can use their CPF- OA, SA & RA to fund their purchases of properties.

optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of the Basic Retirement Sum (BRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of Full Retirement Sum (FRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.

stemEn: Which of the following correctly describes the limitation of Eldershield compared to CareShield Life?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Which of the following correctly describes the limitation of Eldershield compared to CareShield Life?

optionsEn.A: Payout from ElderShield is of a limited period whilst payout from CareShield Life can be for lifetime (assuming the CPF member does not recover from severe disability).
optionsEn.B: Premium from ElderShield is not tax deductible, whilst premium for CareShield Life is tax deductible.
optionsEn.C: ElderShield is managed by private insurers and hence the payout is more stringent than CareShield Life, which is managed by CPF Board.
optionsEn.D: Payouts from ElderShield is not creditor protected whilst payout from CareShield Life is creditor protected.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Payout from ElderShield is of a limited period whilst payout from CareShield Life can be for lifetime (assuming the CPF member does not recover from severe disability).

stemEn:
Additional simple interests are credited to the CPF members’ accounts to boost the members’ savings. For CPF members who are below age 55, which of the following statements regarding additional simple interest is correct?
OA = Ordinary Account
SA = Special Account
RA = Retirement Account
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Additional simple interests are credited to the CPF members’ accounts to boost the members’ savings. For CPF members who are below age 55, 以下哪项陈述 regarding additional simple interest 是正确的? OA = Ordinary Account SA = Special Account RA = Retirement Account

optionsEn.A: Members earn an extra interest of 3% per annum on the first $30K (capped at $20K for OA) and 2% per annum on the next $30K of combined CPF balances.
optionsEn.B: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $60K of combined CPF balances (capped at $20K for OA).
optionsEn.C: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $50K of the combined CPF balances (capped at $10K for OA).
optionsEn.D: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $100K (capped at $30K for OA) of combined CPF OA, SA and RA balances.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 3% per annum on the first $30K (capped at $20K for OA) and 2% per annum on the next $30K of combined CPF balances.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $60K of combined CPF balances (capped at $20K for OA).
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $50K of the combined CPF balances (capped at $10K for OA).
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $100K (capped at $30K for OA) of combined CPF OA, SA and RA balances.

stemEn:
John has just acquired Singapore permanent residency and is now a CPF member. He wants to understand the returns from CPF Special Account.
Which of the following regarding the return from CPF Special Account is CORRECT?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】John has just acquired Singapore 永久居民身份 and is now a CPF member. He wants to understand the returns from CPF Special Account. 关于以下事项，哪一项 the return from CPF Special Account 是正确的?

optionsEn.A: CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 4% per annum.
optionsEn.B: CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 6% per annum.
optionsEn.C: CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 15-year MAS Securities plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.
optionsEn.D: CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 10-year Singapore Government Securities (SGS) plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.

optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 6% per annum.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 15-year MAS Securities plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 10-year Singapore Government Securities (SGS) plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.

explanation.basis: 这道题考察的是中央公积金（Central Provident Fund, CPF）。
explanation.correctReason: 判断时抓住：CPF 始于 1955-07-01,公积金局(MOM 法定机构)管理,三目标:退休、医疗、住房；DPS 最高 S$70,000(≤60 岁)、S$55,000(60–65);CPF 提名不入遗产、结婚即撤销。题干问正确或最符合规则的选项，Peter and his employer 都必须为他的 CPF 缴款（Peter and his employer are both required to contribute to his CPF.）符合该考点要求。所以正确答案是 B。

optionAnalysis.A: A 不选：Peter is exempted from CPF 缴款 as he is a 永久居民 and not a 公民（Peter is exempted from CPF contribution as he is a permanent resident and not a citizen.）不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.B: B 正确：Peter and his employer 都必须为他的 CPF 缴款（Peter and his employer are both required to contribute to his CPF.）。题干问正确或最符合规则的选项，Peter and his employer 都必须为他的 CPF 缴款（Peter and his employer are both required to contribute to his CPF.）符合该考点要求。
optionAnalysis.C: C 不选：Peter is 只需向其 CPF Medisave 账户缴款 as he is not a 新加坡公民（Peter is only required to contribute to his CPF Medisave account as he is not a Singapore Citizen.）不符合题干要求。
optionAnalysis.D: D 不选：Peter’s CPF 缴款是自愿的 as he is 不是在新加坡出生（Peter’s contribution to his CPF is voluntary as he is not born in Singapore.）不符合题干要求。

explanation.finalAnswer: B. Peter and his employer 都必须为他的 CPF 缴款（Peter and his employer are both required to contribute to his CPF.）
